text_original: Dont like the changes to the models with the ultra versions now require gems on top of the membership its a money grab feature while taking away the existing options I used to chat. Its a good game but this sours my experience
text_zh: 我不喜欢这些针对超值版本的模型改动，现在需要在会员基础上额外购买宝石，这是变相牟利的手段，同时剥夺了原有的选择，我以前可以聊天的功能也被取消了。这是一款好游戏，但这些改动让我体验大打折扣
reply_original: Understand your concern about the gem requirements. We're balancing service quality and costs. If you have specific issues, please contact support@fantachat.ai for detailed feedback. Your input helps us improve!
reply_zh: 理解您对宝石需求的关切。我们正在平衡服务质量和成本。如果您有具体问题，请联系support@fantachat.ai以获取详细反馈。您的意见帮助我们改进！
